name: Cookie's Wings from Hell
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the hot sauce as needed for 10 minutes at 350°F.
2. Mix in 1 tablespoon ground red pepper and 1 tablespoon cayenne for milder heat, if desired.
3. Dip chicken wings into the hot sauce mixture.
4. Use as much sauce as needed to coat the wings. The sauce will keep indefinitely.
5. To reheat, pour sauce into a pan and warm it before dipping the wings.
